ProArt B850-CREATOR WIFI NEO

  • Overview
  • Tech Specs
  • Support
ProArt B850-CREATOR WIFI NEO
Where to buy
Explore more motherboards

  • SPECIFICATIONS

  • Ultrafast Networking

  • Roburst Power Design

  • ASUS AI INTELLIGENCE

  • Memory

  • Easy PC DIY

  • Security Control and Remote

  • Management

  • Upgraded UEFI BIOS

  • Trusted Stability

B850-Creator WiFi Neo

The ProArt B850-Creator WiFi Neo is designed to empower creators at every level, delivering optimized performance for the latest AMD Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, and 7000 Series processors, as well as AMD EPYC™ 4005 Series CPUs. Featuring a robust 14+2+1 power stage design, DDR5 support, PCIe® 5.0 expansion, and ultrafast connectivity—including dual 5G Ethernet and WiFi 7—it provides a reliable foundation for demanding creative workloads.

With a refined aesthetic that reflects a professional and elegant design philosophy, the motherboard showcases layered black tones accented with metallic gold details. This platform seamlessly combines performance, connectivity, and design, delivering the power required for today's advanced AI PC applications.

Click to check our New X870E/X870/B850 Motherboard Guide

X870E-CREATOR WIFI KSP

  • Two 5G Ethernet & WiFi 7

    USB 10Gbps Type-C® (DP Alt Mode)

    For rapid data transmission

    USB 20Gbps Type-C® connector

    Up to 30W fast-charge

  • Exclusive AI Technologies

    AI Cache Boost, ASUS AI Advisor, and AI Cooling II

    Easy PC DIY to
    Make Your Life Easier

    PCIe Slot Q-Release, M.2 Q-Release, Q-Slide and Q-Latch

    PCIe® 5.0

    For graphics cards and storage

    14(80A)+2(80A)+1(80A) Power Stages

    Unleash DDR5 with AEMP

    64MB BIOS

    ProArt Creator Hub

Spec Overview

All You Need for Maximum Productivity

Ultrafast Networking

Two 5G Ethernet ports

Two 5G Ethernet connectivity provides flexible network configuration for professional environments, enabling creators to allocate dedicated bandwidth for online connectivity and local storage systems to enhance workflow efficiency, data integrity, and system reliability.



WiFi 7

The revolutionary WiFi 7 is faster than standard WiFi 6*, thanks to tech like 160 MHz channels** on the 6GHz band and 4K QAM*. Multi-Link Operation (MLO) provides a more stable WiFi connection and lower latency, unlocking the realms of the unknown in gaming, streaming and industrial IoT.

* WiFi 7 features require onboard WiFi chipset, WiFi AP, and WiFi 7-supported operating systems to support the corresponding features.
** Specifications vary by model.

Learn more about Multi-Link Operation (MLO) and WiFi 7 technology.


MLO Wizard

MLO Wizard assesses your environment for Multi-Link Operation support across your device, router and operating system, while also visualizing the current traffic capacity on each of your router's frequency bands.

Fully embracing the latest standard, the ProArt B850-Creator WiFi Neo offers PCIe 5.0 support to give unfettered bandwidth to the fastest SSDs and graphics cards available.

PCIe® Lane Optimization

  • Fully utilizes native PCIe 5.0 lanes supported by AMD Ryzen™ 9000 & 7000 CPUs, delivering optimized bandwidth for maximum performance.

  • Cater to professional creators and demanding AI workloads, including dual GPU support for intensive AI and rendering tasks.

Learn more about PCIe® Lane Optimization

PCIe 5.0 Expansion Slots

Both of the x16 expansion slots are PCIe 5.0, offering incredible speeds of up to 64 GB/s for compatible devices. To bear the brunt of massive graphics cards, they are also protected with SafeSlot retention brackets, and the top slot can be released easily via PCIe Slot Q-Release.

Three Onboard M.2 Slots

ProArt B850-Creator WiFi Neo features two PCIe 5.0 M.2 slots to enjoy the fastest data transfers of up to 128 Gbps*, and all M.2 slots support NVMe RAID configurations to take advantage of the latest available speeds.


*Actual transmission speed will be lower than theoretical maximum speed.

USB Type-C® DisplayPort (DP Alt Mode)

This USB Type-C® port delivers transfer speeds of up to 10 Gbps, and it supports an alternate mode that provides DisplayPort™ 1.4 output for up to 8K resolution at 30 Hz. This new feature gives creators premium-grade flexibility to choose between high-speed data or an additional hi-res display.

  • Up to

    10Gbps

  • Support

    DisplayPort 1.4

Quick charging your USB devices

USB 20Gbps Type-C front-panel connector with Quick Charge 4+

This header boosts data transfers with speeds of up to 20 Gbps. It also features Quick Charge 4+, which can quickly charge your pen display, tablet or mobile phone at up to 30 watts.

USB4® Support

ProArt B850-Creator WiFi Neo features USB4® support via a Thunderbolt™ (USB4®) header. With an ASUS add-on card*, ProArt motherboards can enable bi-directional speeds of up to 40 Gbps on a single cable, while providing power to fast-charge device. Additionally, this card has a daisy-chain function for multi-screen connection and supports up to dual displays with 4K resolution.

*ASUS add-on card is sold separately.

The Core of Your Powerful Workstation

Robust Power Design

Designed to meet the needs of high-core-count CPUs, the ProArt B850-Creator WiFi Neo features 14(80A)+2(80A)+1(80A) power stages that integrate high-side and low-side MOSFETs and drivers into packages rated for 80 amps each. This configuration ensures optimal power delivery, efficiency, stability and performance for both current and future AMD processors.

  • 14

    Vcore Power

    (80A, DrMOS)

  • 2

    SOC Power

    (80A, DrMOS)

  • 1

    Misc Power

    (80A, DrMOS)

  • Eight-Layer Server-Grade Design

    Built on an eight-layer server-grade stack for precise signals and stable performance.

  • ProCool Connectors

    These are built to tight specifications to ensure flush contact with PSU power lines. The resulting lower impedance helps to prevent hotspots and connector failure.

  • Superior Chokes & Capacitors

    These are engineered to resist extreme temperatures, providing a higher level of performance than the industry standard.

  • Digi+ VRM Control

    The ASUS Digi+ voltage-regulator module (VRM) is one of the finest in the industry and ensures ultra-smooth power delivery to the CPU.

Intelligent AI Solutions

  • AI Cache Boost

    Supercharge your large language model (LLM) workflows with AI Cache Boost. Exclusive to ASUS AMD 800 and 600 series motherboards that use Ryzen™ 9000 Series CPUs, this BIOS setting optimizes CPU cache and memory pathways to deliver up to 29% faster local LLM performance with high-speed memory tuning.

  • ASUS AI Advisor

    Using AI technology to understand natural-language questions or scenario descriptions, ASUS AI Advisor allows users to explore the functionality and advanced features of ASUS motherboards in a simple and straightforward way.


    * Availability of ASUS AI Advisor may vary by region.

  • AI Cooling II

    Balance the thermals and acoustics of any build with a single click.

AI CACHE BOOST

Supercharge your large language model (LLM) workflows with AI Cache Boost. Exclusive to ASUS AMD 800 and 600 series motherboards that use Ryzen™ 9000 Series CPUs, this BIOS setting optimizes CPU cache and memory pathways to deliver up to 29% faster local LLM performance with high-speed memory tuning.

››› Increase AI LLM performance up to 29% with AI Cache Boost

With an ASUS AMD 600 or 800 series motherboard and a Ryzen™ 9000 series CPU, you can enable the AI Cache Boost setting in the BIOS. This feature applies comprehensive optimizations to CPU cache and memory pathways, greatly reducing the typical performance drop that can happen when VRAM is used up.
Internal testing determined that enabling AI Cache Boost delivered up to a 15% performance uplift when running large language models that exceeded graphics card memory. With high-speed DDR5 memory and additional Infinity Fabric clock (FLCK) speed tuning, this performance uplift nearly doubled.
For enthusiasts, creators or anyone who wants a powerful AI model capable of deep reasoning and natural conversation running on their own hardware, they can enjoy these uplifts today with AI Cache Boost.

> Check out the demo video below <

Traffic Monitor

MLO Wizard assesses your environment for Multi-Link Operation support across your device, router and operating system, while also visualizing the current traffic capacity on each of your router's frequency bands.

Traffic Monitor

Armoury Crate's Traffic Monitor tracks your current WiFi channel usage. Move to a less congested channel by clicking the “Channel Switch” button* for improved network performance.

*The "Channel Switch" function requires pairing with an ASUS router. If not paired with an ASUS router, the channel change process can be performed in the "Router IP" section of the Traffic Monitor.

Fast Check

Armoury Crate's Fast Check empowers users to rapidly detect WiFi signal strength.

Direction Finder

Armoury Crate's Direction Finder* helps users detect the optimal antenna orientation for achieving the best WiFi signal strength.

*The Direction Finder is only compatible with connections in the 5GHz and 6GHz bands

GameFirst

GameFirst is now integrated into Armoury Crate for an even better user experience. GameFirst optimizes networking performance by allocating bandwidth in real time, based on intelligent algorithms designed for various application customizable usage scenarios and corresponding learning algorithms. The latest update includes dedicated support for NVIDIA® GeForce NOW to ensure the lowest latency possible during intense game streaming cloud gaming sessions. To provide a better user's experience, GameFirst is now integrated into Armoury Crate.

AI Cooling II

AI Cooling II balances the thermals and acoustics of any build with a single click. A proprietary ASUS algorithm slashes unnecessary noise while running a quick stress test, and then it monitors CPU temperatures to dynamically adjust fans to optimal speeds.

ASUS AI Advisor

ASUS AI Advisor is an ASUS technical expert that's always available to answer your questions. Owners of compatible ASUS motherboards can interact with this AI-powered technology using natural language to learn more about their hardware. For DIY beginners, it can provide easy-to-understand explanations of one-click optimization features like AI Overclocking and fan speed tuning, and for seasoned PC-building veterans, it can offer guidance and instructions on the latest features offered by ASUS.


* Availability of ASUS AI Advisor may vary by region.

Performance Boost

PBO Enhancement

By aggressively tuning the PBO parameters, AMD's algorithm can leverage the motherboard's robust power solution to ramp up performance even higher.

Click to learn more about PBO Enhancement

Memory

The ProArt B850-Creator WiFi Neo enhances DDR5 performance by providing overclocking options that would otherwise be locked, whether you are dealing with high-speed or entry-level memory modules.

  • Server-Grade DRAM Enhancement

    Thanks to an upgraded memory slot layout and PCB design, now enthusiast-grade kits can achieve 9 GT/s on the ProArt B850-Creator WiFi Neo*.

    *Achievable with advanced BIOS configuration and potentially specialized hardware. Results may vary according to system components.

  • ASUS Enhanced Memory Profile (AEMP)

    This exclusive firmware feature for PMIC-restricted memory modules automatically detects the memory chips on your kit and then presents optimized frequency, timing and voltage profiles that you can effortlessly apply to unleash performance.

DDR5 Strength

For those who want to fly past stock DDR5 speeds*, the ProArt B850-Creator WiFi Neo is ready for enthusiast-grade kits, courtesy of vast AMD EXtended Profiles for Overclocking (EXPO) support. Seasoned veterans can further tweak performance via an extensive array of settings in the UEFI.
Memory overclocking may vary between CPU series. Please refer to the spec table for detailed information.

Learn more about how the latest ASUS AM5 motherboards offer upgraded memory performance.


Eight-Layer Server-Grade Design

Built on a server-grade eight-layer blueprint, the motherboard's core is engineered for precision. High-speed bus signals for PCIe 5.0 and DDR5 are clean and stable via controlled impedance and dedicated power/ground layers, while the stiffer structure enhances durability. The result is quieter signal behavior and steadier performance under pressure.

Easy PC DIY

PCIe® Slot Q-Release

A physical lever unlocks the first PCIe slot's security latch with one tap, greatly simplifying the process of detaching a PCIe card from the motherboard when it's time to upgrade to a new graphics card or other compatible device.

M.2 Q-Release

The M.2 heatsink features a convenient switch to quickly remove it, eliminating the need for tiny screws during SSD installation. Its strong locking mechanism also provides a snug contact surface, helping to ensure reliable heat dissipation for your SSD.

M.2 Q-Latch

The innovative ASUS Q-Latch makes it easy to install or remove an M.2 SSD without the need for specific tools or screws. This design employs a simple locking mechanism to secure the drive and neatly detach it with one tap.

M.2 Q-Slide

A new sliding M.2 latch design supports sizes 2242, 2260 and 2280 for easy device installation.

Q-Antenna

With Q-Antenna, attaching a WiFi antenna to your PC is now easy and fast. Instead of slowly rotating two fasteners until they finally lock in, they just snap into place. Less hassle, and more consistent performance.

The Power of Minimalist Design

A spark of inspiration can breathe life into a concept that leads to a masterpiece. ProArt is a comprehensive ecosystem providing professional creators with a stable foundation for your inspiration. These custom workstations feature award-winning ProArt motherboards, graphics cards, CPU coolers and chassis, pairing with ProArt displays to accelerate your creative workflow and bring the boldest visions and ideas to life.

Learn more about ProArt ecosystem

Everything You Need to Optimize Workflow

Customize Your Personal Settings

ProArt Creator Hub is your personal portal to monitor your PC status, personalize settings or optimize your workflow. It features an intuitive overview dashboard, with quickly switchable fan profiles and performance modes.

WorkSmart

To streamline your workflow, you can select up to 8 apps to be launched at the same time with a single desktop shortcut.

Security Control and Remote Management

Advanced security management functions from ASUS Control Center Express protect the PCs and confidential data in your creative studio.

Learn more about ASUS Control Center Express >>
  • USB Port Management

    Enable or disable the USB port, or set it to Read Only to prevent data leaks.

  • Software Blacklist

    For added security, a software blacklist is available to help prevent the use of high-risk applications.

  • Registry Editor On/Off

    Remotely disable the Registry Editor on client devices to prevent unauthorized changes to system configurations.

  • Upgraded UEFI BIOS

    BIOS Q-Dashboard simplifies system setup with a clear, visual interface, while expanding the capacity to 64MB enables a more powerful experience and extended compatibility with current and future AM5 processors.

  • ASUS MB Manager

    ASUS MB Manager delivers fast, fluid, and intuitive control over essential features, offering a smooth experience for monitoring system stats, accessing fan cooling controls, and fine-tuning advanced WiFi settings. It also works seamlessly with Armoury Crate to provide an even more comprehensive system management experience.

  • ASUS DriverHub

    ASUS DriverHub streamlines the installation and management of ASUS drivers and utilities to keep your hardware up-to-date and perform optimally. This standalone application automatically detects current driver versions and presents available updates in a list view. Users are invited to install ASUS DriverHub after OS installation.

  • ASUS GlideX

    A cross-device, cross-platform screen-sharing, screen-control and operation solution for enhanced productivity across PCs, tablets and smartphones via USB or WiFi. It is compatible with Windows, macOS, Android and iOS.

    • Mirror

    • Extend(PC to Mobile)

    • Extend(PC to PC)

    • Unify Control

64MB BIOS

A larger BIOS chip enables a more powerful interface and extended CPU compatibility with the latest and future AM5 processors, ensuring a smooth, seamless user experience.


Pre-installed WiFi driver

A pre-installed WiFi driver enables users to connect to the internet when installing Windows on their PC; no USB flash drive is needed for driver installation, making the setup process faster and more convenient*.

*Currently available on ROG Glacial, Dark Hero and select Neo motherboards. Future BIOS updates may prioritize support for new CPUs, potentially affecting WiFi driver integration.

Q-Dashboard

Simplify your motherboard configuration with BIOS Q-Dashboard. Its intuitive visual representation of hardware connections and corresponding BIOS settings takes the complexity out of setting up your system. Upgrade now, and discover the power of BIOS Q-Dashboard to easily and efficiently enhance your computing setup.

When you're ready for a deeper dive, delve into the UEFI's Advanced mode and take complete control. Advanced mode enables full control over every aspect of the motherboard, and a built-in search function helps you quickly find the setting you need.

Advanced mode

  • My Favorites

    Quickly locate tuning options and add preferred tools to your favorites list.

  • EZ Flash

    Flash the latest BIOS via the internet from within the BIOS.

  • S.M.A.R.T.

    Check your storage device Self-Monitoring, Analysis, and Reporting Technology (S.M.A.R.T.) logs to gauge reliability or to identify potential failures.

  • GPU POST

    Automatically detect selected ASUS graphics cards to view detailed information.

  • Secure Erase

    Restore your SSDs and NVMe storage to factory settings.

  • Last Modified Log

    Track the last change and save preferred profiles to a USB drive.

  • SATA Port Renaming

    Rename SATA ports for easy identification.

  • ASUS User Profile

    Port configuration settings between different BIOS versions or share them with friends.

  • Q-Fan Control

    Configure the fan's operating speed manually or use pre-configured Standard, Silent, Turbo, or Full Speed modes. By default, system fans will automatically switch to full speed if the temperature reaches 75° C.

  • Aura On/Off mode (Stealth)

    Easily enable or disable Aura RGB lighting or every onboard LED, for a more subdued aesthetic.

Essential OC Control, Simplified

Essential Mode provides quick access to commonly used overclocking settings and key system information, making performance tuning easy without diving into menus that require deeper expertise.


EZ System Tuning

Quickly apply pre-configured profiles for improved system performance or energy savings.


Boost Pro

Enhance system performance by optimizing GPU Boost, AI Cache Boost, and Turbo Game Mode for different usage scenarios.

Trusted Stability

ProArt B850-Creator WiFi Neo is engineered and rigorously tested to offer superior quality, stability and compatibility to ensure that it empowers creativity for years to come.

  • 24/7

    Reliability

  • Up to

    45°C

    Ambient heat

  • 168-hour

    Durability test

  • Up to

    80%

    Relative humidity

Three Months of Free Adobe Creative Cloud

Valued at USD$803.85

Enjoy all things AI at Adobe. Get complimentary membership to Adobe Creative Cloud all Apps and Adobe Substance 3D with the purchase of selected ASUS products.

Learn more

In Search of Sustainable Solution

ASUS is on a mission to create a sustainable future where all can flourish on the planet we call home.

Every step counts, and as part of ASUS's commitment to creating a more sustainable future, ASUS has begun to utilize post-consumer recycled (PCR) plastic and paper materials certified by the Forest Stewardship Council® (FSC®) in the packaging of motherboards.

Join us on our journey as we make the world a better place.

FAQ

  • A motherboard is the central circuit board on a computer, serving as the backbone that connects and enables communication between all internal components, including the CPU, RAM, graphics cards, SSDs and more.
    ASUS offers a wide range of the best motherboards to suit different needs, including the ROG series for pinnacle performance and overclocking, ROG Strix for high-performance gaming and stylish design, ProArt for professional content creators, TUF Gaming for mainstream gaming, and Prime for versatile everyday use.

  • The ASUS ProArt family of products are designed for creative professionals, such as photographers, video editors, architects, and 3D artists. The ProArt series includes professional-grade displays with precise color accuracy, motherboards and graphics cards that allow for advanced, creator-focused configurations, and cases and cooling hardware that prioritize airflow while minimizing distractions.

  • A motherboard plays the most critical role in determining what a new PC can ultimately achieve. To find the best motherboard for your PC, you'll set goals based on your primary use cases, budget, and preferred aesthetics, along with ensured compatibility with the hardware that you intend to connect to your new motherboard. Many users find that the ASUS AM5 motherboard (X870E/X870/B850) family gives them the best options that they need thanks to their full support for today's high-performance consumer CPUs and GPUs, versatile connectivity, ample high-speed M.2 slots, and advanced networking options. ASUS AM5 motherboards make it easy to build a system that's fully next-gen from the ground up.

  • New ASUS AMD 800 Series motherboards are engineered for the AM5 socket, delivering robust support for AMD Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, 7000 and series desktop processors.

  • ProArt B850-CREATOR WIFI NEO motherboard features up to 3 M.2 slots. This can include up to two onboard PCIe 5.0 M.2 slots and one onboard PCIe 4.0 M.2 slot. M.2 slots also be equipped with substantial cooling solutions to ensure stable, high-performance operation.
    ProArt B850-CREATOR WIFI NEO motherboard also features two PCIe® 5.0 x16 SafeSlots for next-generation graphics support.

  • ProArt B850-CREATOR WIFI NEO supports up to 256GB of DDR5 RAM with speeds up to 9000 MT/s. It also features AEMP to enhance memory performance, stability, and compatibility.

  • ProArt B850-CREATOR WIFI NEO motherboard offers two rear-panel 10Gbps Type-C® ports and two 10Gbps Type-A ports. The internal header selection includes two USB 2.0 headers, one USB 5Gbps header, and supports one USB 20Gbps Type-C front-panel connector.

  • ProArt B850-CREATOR WIFI NEO motherboard supports WiFi 7, which is faster than standard WiFi 6 with advanced technologies such as 160 MHz channels on the 6 GHz band and 4K QAM. WiFi 7 also supports Multi-Link Operation (MLO) for connection stability, low latency, and smooth experiences with gaming, streaming, and high-performance wireless workloads.

  • Users can update the BIOS using the BIOS Flashback™ feature or through the UEFI BIOS interface. If your motherboard supports BIOS Flashback, you can update the BIOS without a CPU or memory installed.
    The new ASUS AMD 800 Series motherboards feature an upgraded 64MB ROM BIOS for a smoother interface and expanded compatibility with current and future AM5 processors.

    For detailed instructions, please refer to:
    [Motherboard] How to update BIOS of the motherboard ?(Include different generation CPU) | Official Support | ASUS US

  • ASUS provides two methods for users to update motherboard drivers and utilities. ASUS DriverHub automatically detects, installs, and updates ASUS motherboard drivers through a simple one-click interface, keeping systems up to date and performing at their best. Users can also visit the support page for their motherboard to download drivers separately.

    For detailed instructions, please refer to: https://driverhub.asus.com/

  • With the purchase of eligible ASUS ProArt motherboards, customers receive a complimentary three-month subscription to select Adobe services, including Adobe Creative Cloud Pro, Photography Plan (1TB), Adobe Substance 3D, Adobe Stock, and Acrobat Standard.

  • ProArt Creator Hub is a free ASUS software suite that is designed to be a control center for creators. It provides easy access to system performance settings, color accuracy tools, and creative features, helping users optimize their workflow for professional work.

  • ProArt PC is specifically designed for creators and professional workflows, focusing on high performance, precise color accuracy, strong stability, and support for creative applications such as video editing, 3D rendering, and design. A standard PC, on the other hand, is typically built for general everyday use.

  • Performance comparisons depend on the specific hardware configuration and software used. ProArt PCs are designed to deliver strong performance for creative workloads, while actual rendering time may vary by system setup.

BUILD FOR THE MOST ADVANCED PC FOR GAMING AND CREATING

When only the fastest will do, ASUS motherboards deliver. With faster dual-channel DDR5 memory support, AMD EXPO™ technology and PCIe® 5.0 support for both graphics and NVMe, you can play the most demanding games and deliver your biggest projects with the revolutionary performance of an ASUS motherboard and AMD Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, and 7000 Series processors.

  • 1. Overclocking and/or undervolting AMD processors and memory, including without limitation, altering clock frequencies / multipliers or memory timing / voltage, to operate outside of AMD's published specifications will void any applicable AMD product warranty, even when enabled via AMD hardware and/or software. This may also void warranties offered by the system manufacturer or retailer. Users assume all risks and liabilities that may arise out of overclocking and/or undervolting AMD processors, including, without limitation, failure of or damage to hardware, reduced system performance and/or data loss, corruption or vulnerability. GD-106.

**Product specifications and battery design may vary depending on the model. For any questions, please contact ASUS official customer service.
